case_title: POTTER STAN VS GUZMAN ALBERTO DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY POTTER STAN AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN ALBERTO DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ALBERTO GUZMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
CIVIL SUBPENA FILED AS TO BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR.
